title: Krsna's most fearful form & Pleasing form | SB 3.26.16 | HG Satya Gaura Chandra Dasa
speaker: HG Satya Gaura Chandra Dasa

segments.text: Abhay Charna Arvind Bhakt Vedanta Swami Shrapropada Ki Jai
Iskhan Founder Charya Sevruddha Whole World
Reading from Srimad Bhagavatam, Canto 3, Chapter 26, and Text 16
PAURUSHAM OF THE SUPREME PERSONALITY OF GODHEAD
AHANKARA VIMODASYA DELUDED BY FALSE EGO
THE INFLUENCE OF THE SUPREME PERSONALITY OF GODHEAD
IS FELT IN THE TIME FACTOR
DUE TO THE FALSE EGO OF THE DELUDED SOUL
THE INFLUENCE OF THE SUPREME PERSONALITY
THE INFLUENCE OF THE SUPREME PERSONALITY
IS FELT IN THE TIME FACTOR
THE LIVING ENTITY'S FEAR OF DEATH
IS DUE TO HIS FALSE EGO
IN THE IDENTIFICATION OF BODY AS CELL
IT IS ALSO STATED IN THE SHRIMAT BAGVATAM
MATTER IS THE SPIRIT OF THE SPIRIT
IT IS THE SECONDARY MANIFESTATION OF SPIRIT
FOR MATTER IS PRODUCED FROM SPIRIT
JUST AS THE MATERIAL ELEMENTS DESCRIBED
ARE CAUSED BY THE SUPREME LORD
THE BODY IS ALSO PRODUCT OF THE SPIRIT SOUL
THEREFORE THE MATERIAL BODY IS CALLED
ONE WHO IS ABSORBED IN THIS SECOND ELEMENT
OR SECOND EXHIBITION OF THE SPIRIT
THAT HE IS NOT THIS BODY
THERE IS NO QUESTION OF FEARING DEATH
SINCE THE SPIRIT SOUL DOES NOT DIE
IF THE SPIRIT SOUL ENGAGES IN THE
HE IS COMPLETELY FREED FROM THE PLATFORM
HIS NEXT POSITION IS COMPLETE SPIRITUAL FREEDOM
THE FEAR OF DEATH IS THE ACTION OF KALA
AT THE TIME FACTORED IN THE SPIRITUAL SERVICE
OF THE SUPREME PERSONALITY OF GODHEAD
WHATEVER IS CREATED IS SUBJECT TO
WHICH IS THE ACTION OF TIME
TIME IS A REPRESENTATION OF THE LORD
THAT WE MUST SURRENDER UNTO THE LORD
THE LORD SPEAKS TO EVERY CONDITIONED SOUL
ANY PROBLEM OF BIRTH AND DEATH
WE SHOULD THEREFORE ACCEPT THE TIME FACTOR
AS THE SUPREME PERSONALITY OF GODHEAD
THIS IS FURTHER EXPLAINED IN THE FOLLOWING VERSE
JAYA SHRI KRISHNA CHAITANYA PRABHU NITHYANANDA
SHRI ADVAITHA GADADHARA SHIVA SADHI GAURABHAKTAVANDHA
HARE KRISHNA HARE KRISHNA KRISHNA KRISHNA HARE HARE
HARE RAMA HARE RAMA RAMA RAMA HARE
HARE RAMA HARE RAMA RAMA RAMA HARE
HARE RAMA HARE RAMA RAMA RAMA RAMA HARE
